methods.name: AddSection()
methods.summary: Add a new variable section using the Tedds 'AddSection' function. For information on Tedds calculation functions, use Tedds for Word and refer to the Tedds engineering library index at "Writing your own custom calculations\Calculation writing documentation\Tedds functions"

returns.doc: Returns the unique identifier of the new variable section

methods.name: Eval(string)
methods.summary: Returns the result of calculating an expression using the Tedds 'Eval' function. For information on Tedds calculation functions, use Tedds for Word and refer to the Tedds engineering library index at "Writing your own custom calculations\Calculation writing documentation\Tedds functions"

methods.name: GetVar(string)
methods.summary: Returns the value of a named variable using the Tedds 'GetVar' function

methods.name: SetSection(int, string)
methods.summary: Set the active variable section using the Tedds 'SetSection' function. For information on Tedds calculation functions, use Tedds for Word and refer to the Tedds engineering library index at "Writing your own custom calculations\Calculation writing documentation\Tedds functions"

params.name: sectionId
params.doc: Unique numeric identifier of the section which is to become the active section

methods.name: SetVar(string, object, string, string)
methods.signature: ICalcValue SetVar(string name, object value, string units = "", string attributes = "")
methods.summary: Assigns a value to the named variable using the Tedds 'SetVar' function. For information on Tedds calculation functions, use Tedds for Word and refer to the Tedds engineering library index at "Writing your own custom calculations\Calculation writing documentation\Tedds functions"

params.name: units
params.doc: Units of the assigned value, only applicable if the value is numeric.

params.name: attributes
params.doc: Variable attribute flags (h = hidden, t = temporary, e = expression, r = readonly)

methods.name: SetVarExpr(string, string, string)
methods.signature: ICalcValue SetVarExpr(string name, string value, string attributes = "e")
methods.summary: Assigns an expression value to the named variable using the Tedds 'SetVar' function. For information on Tedds calculation functions, use Tedds for Word and refer to the Tedds engineering library index at "Writing your own custom calculations\Calculation writing documentation\Tedds functions"

params.name: attributes
params.doc: attributes Variable attribute flags (h = hidden, t = temporary, e = expression, r = readonly)

methods.name: VarExists(string)
methods.summary: Returns true if the named variable already exists using the Tedds 'VarExists' function. For information on Tedds calculation functions, use Tedds for Word and refer to the Tedds engineering library index at "Writing your own custom calculations\Calculation writing documentation\Tedds functions"

returns.doc: true if the variable already exists; otherwise false
